notes: Built from Aistra's Revenue Intelligence, Operational Intelligence, and Financial Intelligence capability slides. Form-level pillars 'Customer Intelligence' and 'Financial Intelligence' map as follows: Customer Intelligence = Revenue Intelligence + Operational Intelligence (both customer-facing, different P&L angles). Financial Intelligence = pass-through. Fields 'short_description', 'typical_roi_metrics', and 'use_when' are inferred where the source slides did not specify; the Aistra team should review and refine these. | v2.0 expands Financial Intelligence into a full F&A taxonomy: Bucket 1 'Accounting & CFO Office' (O2C, P2P, R2R, FP&A, Tax, Treasury, Compliance/Risk/IA, ESG) and Bucket 2 'Transactions' (Reconciliations, Lending Ops, Insurance Ops, Customer-Facing Financial Ops).

opportunities.name: Intelligent Collections
opportunities.problem_statement: Cash trapped in receivables, recovery rates stuck
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated collections prioritisation, channel routing, and pre-write-off intervention to compress recovery cycles and lift net recovery rates.
opportunities.use_when: Company shows elevated DSO vs peers, has high B2C credit exposure (NBFC, telecom, utilities, BNPL), mentions receivables concerns in MD&A, or has visible bad-debt write-offs.

opportunities.name: Intelligent Lead Generation
opportunities.problem_statement: Leads coming in, conversion leaking out
opportunities.short_description: AI-led lead scoring, intent prediction, and routing across marketing-to-sales handoff to reduce conversion leakage.
opportunities.use_when: Company has high marketing spend, multiple lead sources, or visible mismatch between top-of-funnel volume and revenue growth.

opportunities.name: Service-to-Sales Conversion
opportunities.problem_statement: Service calls ending without the sale
opportunities.short_description: Real-time intent detection and offer orchestration within service interactions, converting service touchpoints into revenue moments.
opportunities.use_when: Company has large inbound contact-centre operations, recurring customer touchpoints (telco, banking, insurance), or stated ambitions to monetise service channels.

opportunities.name: Retention & Win-back
opportunities.problem_statement: Customers leaving before you see them go
opportunities.short_description: Early-warning churn signal detection and orchestrated retention/win-back interventions across digital, contact-centre, and field channels.
opportunities.use_when: Subscription or recurring-revenue business, visible churn pressure in disclosures, telco/SaaS/insurance/streaming/banking models.

opportunities.name: Cross-sell & Upsell Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: Existing customers worth more than you're capturing
opportunities.short_description: Next-best-product recommendations and propensity-driven offer sequencing across digital and human channels to lift wallet share.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-product portfolio, high existing-customer base, low cross-sell penetration vs peers (banking, insurance, telco, retail loyalty programmes).

opportunities.name: Field-Team Revenue Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: Field teams running blind between visits
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven visit planning, account scoring, and next-best-action prompts for field sales and service reps.
opportunities.use_when: Distributed field-sales or merchandising force (FMCG, pharma, agri-inputs, building materials), beat-plan-driven operating model.

opportunities.name: B2B Sales Buddy / Account Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: B2B sellers losing to faster-prepared competitors
opportunities.short_description: AI-assisted account briefs, opportunity scoring, and proposal generation for B2B sellers to reduce cycle time and improve win rate.
opportunities.use_when: Enterprise B2B sales motion, long sales cycles, complex solution selling (IT services, industrial, B2B SaaS, infrastructure).

opportunities.name: Campaign Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: Marketing spend up, ROAS down, nobody sure why
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven attribution, channel-mix optimisation, and creative performance analytics across paid and owned channels.
opportunities.use_when: Significant marketing budget, multi-channel mix (digital + offline), visible ROAS pressure or attribution gaps in disclosures.

opportunities.name: Customer Segmentation & Personalisation
opportunities.problem_statement: Outbound contact-centre on broadcast scripts
opportunities.short_description: Behavioural segmentation, propensity modelling, and personalised script/offer generation for outbound contact-centre and CRM operations.
opportunities.use_when: Outbound contact-centre operations, mass-market customer base, undifferentiated campaign output, identified personalisation gap.

opportunities.name: Marketing Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: More dashboards, less strategic clarity
opportunities.short_description: Strategic marketing analytics across funnel, mix, attribution, and brand health — synthesised into decision-grade insights rather than data sprawl.
opportunities.use_when: Large marketing function, sprawl of analytics tools without consolidated decision layer, complaint of dashboard fatigue.

opportunities.name: Intelligent Customer Service
opportunities.problem_statement: Service costs growing faster than volume
opportunities.short_description: AI-assisted agent workflows, intent prediction, and automation of repetitive case types to break the cost-per-contact curve.
opportunities.use_when: Large contact-centre operations, rising service costs, customer base growing faster than the company can staff the support function economically.

opportunities.name: Conversation Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: Every conversation a missed signal
opportunities.short_description: Speech and text analytics across customer interactions to extract churn signals, NPS drivers, complaint themes, and revenue triggers.
opportunities.use_when: Significant voice or chat contact-centre operations, limited closed-loop signal capture from interactions, QA done by sampling only.

opportunities.name: Contact Centre Productivity / Agent Performance
opportunities.problem_statement: Floor running on tribal knowledge
opportunities.short_description: Real-time agent assist, performance analytics, and AI-driven coaching to compress ramp time and lift agent productivity.
opportunities.use_when: High agent attrition, long ramp times, performance variance across agent cohorts, knowledge concentrated in a few tenured agents.

opportunities.name: Proactive / Preventive Service
opportunities.problem_statement: Service problems landing as inbound calls
opportunities.short_description: Anomaly detection and proactive outreach to address service issues before they become inbound contacts, shifting volume left.
opportunities.use_when: Subscription or recurring service businesses (telco, utilities, SaaS, banking), high inbound contact volume tied to known issue patterns.

opportunities.name: AI-Augmented CX (Omni-channel)
opportunities.problem_statement: Customer journeys breaking at the channel handoff
opportunities.short_description: Unified context and AI-driven continuity across digital, voice, chat, and field channels to remove handoff friction in customer journeys.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-channel CX operations, repeated complaints about repeating information across channels, fragmented CRM/ticketing stack.

opportunities.name: Workforce Intelligence for CX
opportunities.problem_statement: Workforce decisions made on lagging data
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven forecasting, scheduling, and intraday workforce decisions for CX operations using leading rather than lagging signals.
opportunities.use_when: Large CX workforce, visible scheduling inefficiency, seasonality or volume volatility hard to predict with current tooling.

opportunities.name: Knowledge Operations
opportunities.problem_statement: Frontline answers from yesterday's information
opportunities.short_description: AI-curated knowledge base with dynamic freshness, contextual retrieval, and embedded use within agent and self-service flows.
opportunities.use_when: Frequent product/policy changes, stale knowledge base complaints, repeated frontline questions about same topics, low self-service deflection.

opportunities.name: Complaint & Escalation Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: Complaints handled, root causes never closed
opportunities.short_description: Theme detection across complaints and escalations with closed-loop root-cause action and recurrence monitoring.
opportunities.use_when: Regulated industries with formal complaint processes (banking, insurance, telco, healthcare), or visible recurring complaint themes.

opportunities.name: Self-Service & Digital Containment
opportunities.problem_statement: Customers calling for things they could solve themselves
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven self-service journeys, intent-aware bots, and proactive containment to deflect contacts that don't need a human.
opportunities.use_when: High inbound contact volume, large share of repetitive contact types, stated digital-first ambition, underperforming bot/IVR.

opportunities.name: Customer Master Data Management
opportunities.problem_statement: Duplicate customer records, inconsistent hierarchies, and stale credit attributes corrupt downstream billing, collections, and reporting.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated customer master governance: deduplication, hierarchy resolution, credit attribute enrichment, and continuous data-quality monitoring across ERPs and CRMs.
typical_roi_metrics: Days to onboard a new customer
opportunities.use_when: Multiple billing entities or ERPs; M&A activity; recurring complaints about wrong invoicing parent; manual hierarchy maintenance.

opportunities.name: Credit Management & Scoring
opportunities.problem_statement: Credit limits set by gut feel; slow credit reviews; bad debt rising; sales blocked by credit holds at month-end.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven credit scoring on internal payment behaviour plus external signals (bureau, news, peer payment); dynamic limit setting; pre-emptive credit hold release workflow.
typical_roi_metrics: Bad debt as % of revenue reduction
opportunities.use_when: Rising bad debt; long credit-review cycles; high credit-hold incidence at period close; growing international portfolio.

opportunities.name: Sales Order Management
opportunities.problem_statement: Order errors, manual validation, and pricing exceptions slow fulfilment and feed downstream invoicing disputes.
opportunities.short_description: Intelligent order capture and validation: AI checks pricing, contract terms, credit, and inventory at order entry; routes exceptions to the right desk with full context.
opportunities.use_when: High order volume across channels; frequent pricing exceptions; manual order validation desks; correlation between order errors and AR disputes.

opportunities.name: Contract & Pricing Compliance
opportunities.problem_statement: Special pricing approvals leak; rebate accruals are guesswork; revenue is left on the table or written off later in disputes.
opportunities.short_description: AI-monitored pricing-compliance layer over CRM/CPQ/ERP: detects off-list pricing, missing approvals, missed rebate triggers; automates accrual estimation.
opportunities.use_when: Heavy use of special pricing; rebate programs >5% of revenue; pricing-discipline complaints from finance; frequent rebate true-up adjustments.

opportunities.name: Billing & Invoicing Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: Recurring, milestone, and usage billing run as parallel manual processes; errors and delays compound at scale.
opportunities.short_description: Unified billing engine with AI exception handling across recurring, milestone, usage, and pro-forma billing; auto-resolves contract-to-invoice mismatches.
opportunities.use_when: Multiple billing engines / spreadsheets; long days-to-bill; mix of subscription, project, and usage-based revenue.

opportunities.name: E-Invoicing & Statutory Compliance
opportunities.problem_statement: Country e-invoice mandates (IRN/GST, Peppol, EU CTC) create patchwork integrations and chronic exception backlogs.
opportunities.short_description: AI-managed e-invoicing layer that handles country-specific mandates, IRN generation/cancellation, schema validation, and reconciliation against GST/VAT portals.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-country invoicing; new statutory mandates; high IRN/GST reconciliation overhead; recent compliance penalties.

opportunities.name: Receivables & DSO Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: AR ledger is a passive record; nobody sees which customers are slipping until DSO is already up by 5 days.
opportunities.short_description: Continuous AI monitoring of AR aging, customer payment behaviour, and external signals; cohort DSO tracking with predictive deterioration alerts.
opportunities.use_when: DSO above industry benchmark; spike-and-correct pattern in working capital; manual AR aging review monthly.

opportunities.name: Cash Application & Auto-Match
opportunities.problem_statement: Remittance advice arrives in 12 formats; cash sits on-account; finance manually parses to clear.
opportunities.short_description: ML-powered cash application: parses remittance advice (PDF, email, EDI, bank file), auto-matches against open AR with confidence scoring, learns from corrections.
opportunities.use_when: Cash-app team >3 FTE; <70% auto-match rate; large on-account AR balance; multi-currency or multi-bank receipts.

opportunities.name: Intelligent Collections
opportunities.problem_statement: Collectors work down a static list; the right next action (call, email, restructure) is judgment-based and inconsistent.
opportunities.short_description: AI-prioritised collections worklist with next-best-action recommendations per account, channel routing, promise-to-pay tracking, and pre-write-off intervention.
opportunities.use_when: Collections team operating on aging buckets only; high write-off rate; no closed-loop measurement of intervention effectiveness.

opportunities.name: Disputes & Deductions Management
opportunities.problem_statement: Short-pays pile up; root-cause investigation is manual; deduction patterns aren't fed back to prevent recurrence.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven dispute triage: classifies short-pays by root cause (pricing, freight, damage, promo), routes to the right resolver, and feeds patterns back to commercial.
opportunities.use_when: Deductions >2% of revenue; resolution cycles >30 days; no systematic root-cause analytics on disputes.

opportunities.name: Revenue Recognition Automation
opportunities.problem_statement: ASC 606 / Ind AS 115 logic lives in spreadsheets and SOPs; performance-obligation allocation is manual and audit-fragile.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported revenue recognition: parses contracts, identifies performance obligations, allocates SSP, and posts deferred revenue with full audit trail.
opportunities.use_when: Complex revenue models (subscription, milestone, usage); manual contract-to-revenue mapping; recent revenue restatements or audit findings.

opportunities.name: Deferred Revenue & Contract Asset/Liability Tracking
opportunities.problem_statement: Deferred revenue waterfall, contract assets, and contract liabilities are tracked in Excel — error-prone and slow.
opportunities.short_description: Automated tracking of deferred revenue, contract assets, and liabilities by contract; AI flags drift vs. expected waterfall.
typical_roi_metrics: Time to produce deferred revenue roll-forward
opportunities.use_when: Subscription/multi-element contracts; manual deferred-revenue spreadsheets; auditor focus on revenue cutoff.

opportunities.name: Rebates, Royalties & Customer Incentives
opportunities.problem_statement: Rebate accrual estimates drift; customer incentive programs aren't measured against actual outcomes.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven rebate accrual and settlement engine: tracks program eligibility, computes accruals, predicts customer attainment, settles automatically.
opportunities.use_when: Rebate/incentive programs >5% of revenue; large true-up adjustments at year-end; ad-hoc program design without measured ROI.

opportunities.name: Bad Debt Provisioning & Write-Offs
opportunities.problem_statement: Bad debt provisions are formula-based and lag actual deterioration; write-offs surprise the P&L.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven expected-credit-loss modelling on customer-level payment behaviour and external signals; dynamic provisioning with management override.
opportunities.use_when: Material ECL provisions; auditor questions on provision methodology; ECL surprises in recent periods.

opportunities.name: Vendor Master & Onboarding
opportunities.problem_statement: Vendor onboarding takes weeks; KYC, sanctions, and beneficial-ownership checks are manual and inconsistent.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated vendor onboarding: extracts data from supplier-provided docs, runs sanctions/PEP/beneficial-ownership screening, scores vendor risk, deduplicates against master.
opportunities.use_when: Onboarding cycles >7 days; multiple vendor masters; compliance exposure on sanctions/beneficial ownership; M&A consolidating vendor lists.

opportunities.name: Sourcing & RFx Intelligence
opportunities.problem_statement: Sourcing events use the same vendor lists every time; market intelligence on price benchmarks is manual.
opportunities.short_description: AI-augmented sourcing: vendor discovery from external sources, automated RFx scoring against weighted criteria, market price benchmarks.
opportunities.use_when: Concentrated supplier base; little market benchmarking; long sourcing cycles; recent supplier disruption events.

opportunities.name: Contract Lifecycle Management
opportunities.problem_statement: Contracts sit in shared drives; obligations and renewals slip; commercial leverage is lost.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven CLM with obligation extraction, renewal-and-pricing alerts, and auto-population of standard clauses; integrates with sourcing and P2P.
opportunities.use_when: Contract base >500 active; renewals managed via spreadsheet; recent missed-renewal incidents; obligation tracking informal.

opportunities.name: Requisition & Purchase Order Workflow
opportunities.problem_statement: PR-to-PO cycle is slow; approval routings are manual; non-PO spend leaks; off-contract purchases bypass commercial.
opportunities.short_description: Intelligent PR/PO workflow: AI suggests catalogue items, routes approvals by amount-and-risk, flags off-contract purchases, predicts likely PO exceptions.
opportunities.use_when: Manual approval routing; high non-PO spend; off-contract purchases >10% of indirect spend; commercial-team complaints about leakage.

opportunities.name: Goods Receipt & 3-Way Match
opportunities.problem_statement: GR-IR mismatches accumulate; matching exceptions block payments; warehouse and finance argue about quantities.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven match engine: 3-way / 4-way match with smart tolerance application, GR-IR reconciliation, exception routing with full context.
opportunities.use_when: Material GR-IR balance; manual matching team; tolerances applied inconsistently; high invoice-block rate at period end.

opportunities.name: Invoice Capture & Ingestion
opportunities.problem_statement: Invoices arrive across portals, emails, EDI, and paper; data extraction is manual; exceptions snowball.
opportunities.short_description: AI-powered invoice ingestion: OCR with contextual extraction, e-invoice schema validation, EDI ingestion; learns from corrections; classifies by spend category.
opportunities.use_when: AP team >5 FTE; <70% straight-through processing; multi-channel invoice intake; complaints about slow invoice posting.

opportunities.name: Invoice Exception Handling
opportunities.problem_statement: Price, quantity, and tax variances send invoices back to manual queues; resolution is unstructured.
opportunities.short_description: AI exception-resolution layer: classifies variance type, suggests resolution, auto-resolves within learned tolerances, routes the rest with structured context.
opportunities.use_when: High invoice-exception volume; large AP exception queue; recurring price/qty variances on same vendors.

opportunities.name: Tax Determination on AP
opportunities.problem_statement: GST input credit, VAT, and withholding determination is rule-coded into ERP and outdated as soon as a tax notification lands.
opportunities.short_description: AI-maintained tax-determination engine: keeps rate and rule tables current, applies input-credit rules, withholds correctly, flags edge cases.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-jurisdiction tax exposure; manual tax-table maintenance; recent input-credit denials; large WHT/TDS portfolio.

opportunities.name: Payment Runs & Cash Optimisation
opportunities.problem_statement: Payment runs are scheduled by calendar, not by working-capital optimisation; payment-instrument choice is rule-based and stale.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven payment scheduling: optimises run timing for working capital, selects payment instrument (ACH/wire/p-card/virtual) by cost-to-pay, manages cross-border FX cost.
opportunities.use_when: Multiple bank relationships; cross-border payments; >10K payments/month; rule-based instrument selection.

opportunities.name: T&E and Corporate Card Management
opportunities.problem_statement: Expense reports are submitted late, policy is enforced after-the-fact, audit sampling catches only obvious offenders.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven T&E platform: receipt OCR, policy enforcement at submission, AI fraud/anomaly detection, audit-sampling-as-continuous-monitoring.
opportunities.use_when: Spend on T&E >1% of revenue; manual expense report review; recurring policy breaches; recent T&E fraud incidents.

opportunities.name: P-Card & Virtual Card Programs
opportunities.problem_statement: P-card program is underused; rebate revenue is left on the table; virtual cards aren't deployed to the right spend categories.
opportunities.short_description: AI program-management for cards: identifies spend categories suitable for card migration, predicts rebate uplift, monitors compliance and concentration risk.
opportunities.use_when: Mature corporate-card relationship; under-deployed virtual card program; rebate revenue <industry benchmark.

opportunities.name: Supplier Reconciliation
opportunities.problem_statement: Supplier statements arrive monthly; manual reconciliation against AP ledger is days of work; mismatches linger.
opportunities.short_description: Automated supplier-statement ingestion and reconciliation against AP ledger; AI flags root cause of differences; closes loop with supplier on disputes.
opportunities.use_when: Large supplier base; manual statement reconciliation; recurring supplier-relationship escalations over balances.

opportunities.name: 1099 / TDS / Withholding Reporting
opportunities.problem_statement: Year-end withholding reporting is a fire drill; certificate management is manual; reconciliation against tax authority data is painful.
opportunities.short_description: AI-managed withholding compliance: continuous tracking of TDS/1099 thresholds, certificate management, reconciliation against tax authority portals, year-end automation.
opportunities.use_when: Large 1099/TDS portfolio; year-end reporting cited as a pain point; recent TDS notices or reconciliation gaps.

opportunities.name: Spend Analytics
opportunities.problem_statement: Spend reporting is a quarterly slide deck; category, supplier, and maverick-spend insight is lost in the middle.
opportunities.short_description: AI-classified continuous spend analytics: category trees, supplier concentration, maverick-spend detection, savings-tracking against approved initiatives.
opportunities.use_when: No live spend cube; category trees inconsistent; no savings tracking against sourcing initiatives.

opportunities.name: Chart of Accounts Governance
opportunities.problem_statement: Chart of accounts has grown organically; ledger postings hit the wrong account; reporting drift is constant.
opportunities.short_description: AI-monitored CoA governance: detects miscoding patterns, suggests consolidation, predicts impact of CoA changes before they're made.
opportunities.use_when: CoA >500 accounts; ledger-mapping complaints; recent reporting drift between sub-ledger and GL.

opportunities.name: Journal Entry Workflow
opportunities.problem_statement: Manual journals are a black box; approval workflow is inconsistent; risky entries don't get the scrutiny they deserve.
opportunities.short_description: AI-routed JE workflow: scores each manual journal for risk (size, account, period, preparer), routes high-risk to senior review, auto-approves low-risk recurring journals.
opportunities.use_when: Manual JE volume >500/month; recurring JE backlog; auditor focus on manual journals; close-cycle JE bottleneck.

opportunities.name: Sub-Ledger to GL Reconciliation
opportunities.problem_statement: Sub-ledger to GL differences appear at close; reconciliation is manual and the root cause investigation eats into close days.
opportunities.short_description: Continuous sub-ledger to GL reconciliation: AI matches at transaction level, classifies differences by cause, automates the recurring ones, flags real exceptions.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-system landscape (separate AR/AP/inventory sub-ledgers); recurring close-day delays attributed to recon; manual rec spreadsheets.

opportunities.name: Intercompany Transactions
opportunities.problem_statement: Intercompany flows mismatch between entities; netting is monthly and clunky; FX timing differences create reconciliation noise.
opportunities.short_description: Intercompany matching engine: real-time match, AI-driven discrepancy resolution, automated netting, multi-currency settlement orchestration.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-entity group; cross-border IC flows; recurring IC out-of-balance issues; large IC volume.

opportunities.name: Fixed Asset Accounting
opportunities.problem_statement: Capitalisation decisions are manual; depreciation schedules drift; impairment indicators aren't proactively surfaced.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven fixed asset accounting: capex classification, depreciation schedule maintenance, impairment-indicator monitoring, disposal automation.
opportunities.use_when: Large FA register; recent impairment surprises; manual CWIP-to-asset transitions; asset tagging incomplete.

opportunities.name: Inventory Accounting
opportunities.problem_statement: Inventory valuation, NRV testing, and cycle-count adjustments are manual; COGS surprises emerge late.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven inventory accounting: NRV testing automation, cycle-count exception triage, COGS reconciliation, slow-moving provisioning.
opportunities.use_when: Inventory >10% of total assets; recurring COGS variances; manual NRV process; slow-moving provisions are formula-based.

opportunities.name: Lease Accounting
opportunities.problem_statement: ASC 842 / Ind AS 116 schedules live in dedicated tools that don't talk to the GL; modifications cause cascade work.
opportunities.short_description: AI-managed lease accounting layer: contract ingestion, schedule generation, modification handling, GL postings, disclosure automation.
opportunities.use_when: Active lease portfolio (real estate or equipment); recent lease-mod activity; manual schedule maintenance; disclosure complaints.

opportunities.name: Accruals, Provisions & Prepayments
opportunities.problem_statement: Period-end accruals are estimated, prepayments are released by formula, and quality varies by preparer.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven accrual estimation from invoice and PO data; automated prepayment release; provision adequacy monitoring against actual.
opportunities.use_when: Material accrual estimates at period end; manual prepayment registers; auditor scrutiny on estimate quality.

opportunities.name: Period Close Orchestration
opportunities.problem_statement: Close calendar lives in a spreadsheet; task dependencies are tribal knowledge; bottlenecks are diagnosed post-mortem.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated close: real-time task tracking with dependency awareness, bottleneck prediction, certification workflow, post-close analytics.
opportunities.use_when: Close cycle >5 working days; informal close coordination; recurring late-task patterns; auditor focus on close discipline.

opportunities.name: Balance Sheet Reconciliations
opportunities.problem_statement: BS recs are done in Excel by individuals; quality varies; auditors find unsupported reconciling items every year.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven BS reconciliation platform: standardised templates, auto-population from source systems, anomaly flagging, certifier workflow with audit trail.
opportunities.use_when: BS recs in Excel; recurring audit findings on rec quality; large BS-rec population to certify at month-end.

opportunities.name: Bank Reconciliation
opportunities.problem_statement: Bank reconciliations lag the close; manual matching of transactions is slow; unidentified items linger.
opportunities.short_description: Continuous AI-driven bank reconciliation: matches against AR/AP/journals at transaction level, classifies unmatched items, auto-clears the recurring ones.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-bank/multi-currency receipts; manual bank-rec spreadsheets; recurring late-clearing items; treasury-finance friction.

opportunities.name: Consolidation & FX Translation
opportunities.problem_statement: Multi-entity consolidation runs in dedicated tools that need manual feeds; CTA, minority interest, and elims are checked by hand.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated consolidation: data validation across feeds, CTA computation, automated elimination entries, minority-interest tracking, comparison vs. prior cycle.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-entity, multi-currency group; manual consolidation tool feeds; recurring elim or CTA reconciliation noise; group close-cycle pressure.

opportunities.name: Statutory Financials & Disclosures
opportunities.problem_statement: Statutory financials prep is annual project work; disclosure language is copy-paste with manual checks.
opportunities.short_description: AI-assisted statutory financials and disclosures: data flows from consolidation, disclosure language compared to prior year with auto-flagged change deltas.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-jurisdiction statutory financials; annual prep cycle pain; recurring audit queries on disclosure consistency.

opportunities.name: Management Reporting & MIS
opportunities.problem_statement: MIS packs are built each month by hand from multiple sources; insight gets lost in production effort.
opportunities.short_description: AI-generated MIS: flash, P&L, BS, CF, KPI packs assembled from ledger and operational data; commentary drafted from variance signals.
opportunities.use_when: Manual MIS in Excel/PowerPoint; complaints about late or stale MIS; CFO time spent on production rather than interpretation.

opportunities.name: Variance Analysis
opportunities.problem_statement: Variance analysis is a column in the MIS pack; root-cause investigation happens in side conversations and rarely makes it back to the books.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven variance attribution: decomposes actuals vs. budget vs. forecast vs. prior by driver; surfaces likely causes from operational data; closes the loop on recurring variances.
opportunities.use_when: Large variances in recent periods; CFO-COO friction over variance ownership; variance commentary is vague.

opportunities.name: Audit Support & Internal Controls
opportunities.problem_statement: Audit prep is a 6-week scramble; PBC lists, sampling, walkthroughs, and evidence collection are manual and stressful.
opportunities.short_description: AI-assisted audit readiness: continuous evidence collection, sample selection, walkthrough documentation, control-test automation, SOX/ICFR test execution.
opportunities.use_when: Annual audit pain; SOX/ICFR scope material; control deficiencies in recent years; auditor complaints about evidence timeliness.

opportunities.name: Annual Operating Plan & Bottom-Up Budgeting
opportunities.problem_statement: Annual planning is a four-month project; bottom-up consolidation is spreadsheets; iterations are slow.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated AOP: driver-based templates per cost centre, automated consolidation, real-time scenario impact, sensitivity testing.
opportunities.use_when: AOP cycle >3 months; spreadsheet-heavy bottom-up; multiple iteration loops with CEO/board.

opportunities.name: Rolling Forecasts
opportunities.problem_statement: Forecasts are quarterly events, not living documents; revenue, cost, and headcount forecasts drift between cycles.
opportunities.short_description: Continuous rolling forecasts: AI-driven driver forecasts on revenue/cost/headcount/capex, real-time variance to plan, auto-flagged forecast deterioration.
opportunities.use_when: Quarterly-only forecast cycle; large forecast variances vs. actual; demand for monthly refresh from board.

opportunities.name: Long-Range Strategic Plan
opportunities.problem_statement: 3-5 year plans are built once and forgotten; strategic alternatives aren't quantitatively compared.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported LRP: scenario modelling, strategic-alternative comparison, capital allocation across business units, refresh discipline.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-BU group; recent strategy refresh discussions; capital-allocation decisions on the table.

opportunities.name: Scenario & Sensitivity Modelling
opportunities.problem_statement: Scenarios are hand-built when asked; sensitivity tables are not maintained; alternatives are slow to produce.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven scenario engine: macro/operational/competitive scenarios run on demand, tornado-chart sensitivity, decision-grade outputs in hours not weeks.
opportunities.use_when: Frequent CEO/board scenario requests; manual scenario building; slow decision cycles attributed to modelling lag.

opportunities.name: Driver-Based Planning
opportunities.problem_statement: Plans are line-item-by-line-item in spreadsheets; the drivers behind the numbers aren't explicit.
opportunities.short_description: Driver-based planning rebuild: revenue drivers (volume × price × mix), cost drivers (headcount × rate × utilisation), automated driver tracking against actuals.
opportunities.use_when: Heavy reliance on spreadsheet line-item planning; weak link between operational drivers and financial outputs.

opportunities.name: Product, Segment, Channel & Customer Profitability
opportunities.problem_statement: P&L is reported by entity; product/segment/channel/customer profitability is a quarterly slide that nobody trusts.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven cost allocation engine: activity-based assignment, multi-dimensional P&L, customer-level profitability monitoring with confidence indicators.
opportunities.use_when: P&L only at entity level; sales force comp tied to revenue not margin; private-equity ownership demanding customer P&L.

opportunities.name: Cost Allocations & Transfer Pricing
opportunities.problem_statement: Allocation rules ossify; the basis becomes mysterious; transfer pricing margins drift from policy.
opportunities.short_description: AI-monitored allocations: keeps allocation rules current, monitors transfer-pricing outcomes against policy, surfaces drift for review.
opportunities.use_when: Complex allocation framework; intercompany TP arrangements; recent TP audit pressure or queries.

opportunities.name: Capex Governance
opportunities.problem_statement: Capex business cases differ in quality; approvals are politics; post-implementation review rarely happens.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported capex governance: standard business-case templates, scoring against strategic fit and IRR, automated post-implementation review.
opportunities.use_when: Material capex programme; weak post-investment discipline; capital-allocation pressure from board/sponsor.

opportunities.name: Working Capital Management
opportunities.problem_statement: DSO/DPO/DIO are reported monthly; root-cause analytics are post-hoc; working capital releases are tactical not systematic.
opportunities.short_description: Continuous working-capital monitoring with AI-driven root-cause attribution: customer-level DSO drift, vendor-level DPO opportunities, inventory ageing.
opportunities.use_when: Working capital >industry benchmark; pressure from sponsor/CFO; tactical-only working-capital initiatives.

opportunities.name: Cash Flow Forecasting
opportunities.problem_statement: Direct and indirect cash flow forecasts are produced manually each quarter; weekly cash positions are spreadsheet-based.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven direct cash flow forecasting at daily/weekly granularity; indirect-method tie-out automation; treasury-FP&A integration.
opportunities.use_when: Cash-flow forecast pain at board meetings; large cash buffers held due to forecast uncertainty; cross-border cash visibility issues.

opportunities.name: Board & Investor Reporting
opportunities.problem_statement: Board packs and earnings prep eat senior FP&A time; investor Q&A prep is firefighting.
opportunities.short_description: AI-assisted board/investor reporting: pack production from live data, narrative drafting from variance signals, investor-Q&A prep from prior calls.
opportunities.use_when: Quarterly board cycle; investor calls; manual pack production; CFO time consumed by pack prep.

opportunities.name: KPI Governance & Definitions Library
opportunities.problem_statement: KPI definitions drift across teams; one number, three answers; nobody knows which is right.
opportunities.short_description: AI-governed KPI library: single source of definitions, lineage tracking, drift detection, certification workflow for new KPIs.
opportunities.use_when: Recurring KPI disputes; multiple sources for the same number; data-platform investments demanding KPI governance.

opportunities.name: Business Partnering
opportunities.problem_statement: FP&A team produces packs but isn't in commercial/ops/HR rooms; insight lives in finance and dies there.
opportunities.short_description: AI-augmented business partners: enables one finance partner to support multiple business units with deeper analytics, faster turnaround, more ad-hoc support.
opportunities.use_when: FP&A team thin relative to business units; complaints that finance doesn't show up; demand for self-serve analytics.

opportunities.name: Direct Tax Provisioning & Returns
opportunities.problem_statement: Direct tax provision is built in spreadsheets each quarter; return filings are project work.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven direct tax provisioning: deferred tax computation, ETR walk, return-to-provision reconciliation, filing workflow.
opportunities.use_when: Material tax provision; multi-jurisdiction filings; recurring tax-audit pressure; ETR volatility issues.

opportunities.name: Indirect Tax (GST/VAT) Operations
opportunities.problem_statement: GSTR-2A/2B mismatches drive refund delays; VAT returns are manual; refund cycles are punishing.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated indirect tax: continuous GST/VAT return prep, GSTR-2A/2B matching, refund tracking, ITC optimisation.
opportunities.use_when: Material GST/VAT exposure; refund delays cited; manual ITC reconciliation; multi-state/multi-country VAT.

opportunities.name: Transfer Pricing Documentation
opportunities.problem_statement: TP documentation is annual project work; master file, local file, and CbCR are reactive to deadlines.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported TP documentation: continuous benchmarking, master/local file generation, CbCR automation, controversy-prep evidence library.
opportunities.use_when: BEPS-affected group; complex IC structure; recent TP audit or controversy; manual master/local file prep.

opportunities.name: Withholding Tax Computation & Compliance
opportunities.problem_statement: TDS/WHT computation rules change frequently; certificate management is manual; deposits and returns are deadline-driven.
opportunities.short_description: AI-managed WHT engine: computation rules current, certificate management, deposit scheduling, return reconciliation against tax authority.
opportunities.use_when: Large WHT/TDS portfolio; multi-country payments; recent WHT notices or reconciliation gaps.

opportunities.name: Tax Audits & Litigation Support
opportunities.problem_statement: Tax audit responses are bespoke; evidence is hunted across systems; positions are weakened by slow document retrieval.
opportunities.short_description: AI-assisted audit/litigation support: evidence library, position-paper drafting, precedent tracking, response-cycle management.
opportunities.use_when: Active tax audits or litigation; multi-jurisdiction exposure; weak evidence retrieval; high outside-counsel spend.

opportunities.name: Tax Planning & Structuring
opportunities.problem_statement: Tax planning is annual; structural opportunities (group reorganisation, holding structures, treaty access) are spotted late.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported tax planning: scenario modelling on structures, treaty benefit analysis, M&A tax due diligence, real-time policy-change impact.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-entity group; active M&A; CFO interest in structural optimisation; treaty-network exposure.

opportunities.name: Cash Positioning & Concentration
opportunities.problem_statement: Cash sits in 30+ bank accounts; concentration moves are weekly; visibility is end-of-day.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated cash positioning: real-time visibility across bank accounts, optimised concentration moves, idle-cash detection.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-bank/multi-currency cash positions; idle-cash complaints; manual sweep processes.

opportunities.name: Bank Account Management
opportunities.problem_statement: Bank account opening/closing is paper-heavy; signatory management is informal; audit risk accumulates.
opportunities.short_description: AI-managed bank account lifecycle: opening/closing workflow, signatory governance, audit-ready registry, dormancy detection.
opportunities.use_when: Bank account base >20; multiple banks; recent signatory/audit findings; M&A integration of bank accounts.

opportunities.name: Liquidity Forecasting
opportunities.problem_statement: Short and medium-term liquidity forecasts are spreadsheet-based; large safety buffers are held because forecasts aren't trusted.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven liquidity forecasting: short-term (daily/weekly) and medium-term forecasts with confidence intervals, scenario stress-testing, AR/AP-pattern-aware.
opportunities.use_when: Large cash buffers; refinancing cycles; treasury-FP&A friction on cash visibility.

opportunities.name: FX Exposure & Hedging
opportunities.problem_statement: FX exposures are identified at month-end; hedging is ad-hoc; P&L impact comes as a surprise.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven FX exposure monitoring: continuous transaction- and translation-exposure visibility, hedging-policy compliance, hedge-effectiveness assessment.
opportunities.use_when: Material FX exposure (multi-currency); recent FX-driven earnings volatility; informal hedge policy.

opportunities.name: Interest Rate Risk & Hedging
opportunities.problem_statement: Floating-rate debt exposures move with rates; hedging decisions are reactive; rate-cycle scenarios aren't modelled.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven IR exposure monitoring and hedging-decision support: scenario modelling, hedge-vs-no-hedge cost analysis, hedge-effectiveness assessment.
opportunities.use_when: Floating-rate debt; multi-currency debt portfolio; refinancing cycle; rate-cycle pressure.

opportunities.name: Debt Management
opportunities.problem_statement: Drawdowns, covenants, repayments, and refinancings live in calendars and spreadsheets; covenant breaches are last-minute scrambles.
opportunities.short_description: AI-managed debt-portfolio platform: drawdown/repayment scheduling, real-time covenant monitoring with predictive breach alerts, refinancing scenario modelling.
opportunities.use_when: Material debt; multiple facilities; covenant-heavy structures; recent or upcoming refinancing.

opportunities.name: Surplus Investment Management
opportunities.problem_statement: Surplus cash is invested in MMFs and FDs by treasury team; rate-shopping and counterparty diversification are manual.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported surplus investment: rate-shopping across MMF/FD/MF options, counterparty-risk diversification, policy-compliance monitoring.
opportunities.use_when: Material surplus cash; investment policy in place; treasury-team capacity constrained on yield optimisation.

opportunities.name: Counterparty Risk Monitoring
opportunities.problem_statement: Counterparty risk (banks, customers, vendors) is reviewed periodically; deterioration is detected late.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven counterparty risk monitoring: continuous review of bank/customer/vendor financial health, external-signal monitoring, limit enforcement.
opportunities.use_when: Large counterparty portfolio; recent counterparty event; international counterparty exposure.

opportunities.name: In-House Bank / Payment Factory
opportunities.problem_statement: Subsidiary banking is fragmented; intercompany payments are inefficient; bank-fee leakage is high.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated in-house bank / payment factory: centralised group payments, intercompany-payments-on-net, bank-fee optimisation.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-subsidiary group; fragmented banking; high IC payment volume; bank-fee leakage complaints.

opportunities.name: Internal Audit Planning & Execution
opportunities.problem_statement: Annual audit plan is built once and rarely refreshed; risk-based audit selection is judgment-driven.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported internal audit planning: continuous risk scoring across entities and processes, audit-plan optimisation, audit-execution workflow.
opportunities.use_when: IA function operating with limited capacity; risk-based audit ambition; multiple entities to cover.

opportunities.name: Fraud Risk Assessment & Forensics
opportunities.problem_statement: Fraud detection relies on whistleblowers and external auditors; analytical detection is manual.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven fraud detection: anomaly detection on transactions/expenses/payroll/journal entries, forensic-investigation support, case management.
opportunities.use_when: High transaction volume; recent fraud incidents; weak analytical-fraud-detection capability.

opportunities.name: Enterprise Risk Register & Reporting
opportunities.problem_statement: Risk register lives in Excel and is updated quarterly; emerging risks are missed.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported ERM: continuous risk-environment monitoring, emerging-risk detection from external signals, risk-reporting automation.
opportunities.use_when: Active board risk committee; emerging-risk discipline ambition; multi-geography risk landscape.

opportunities.name: Regulatory Reporting
opportunities.problem_statement: Regulatory filings (RBI, SEBI, MCA, SEC equivalents) consume disproportionate finance time; submission cycles are deadline-driven.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated regulatory reporting: filing-cycle workflow, data validation against filing rules, change-tracking against regulatory updates.
opportunities.use_when: Multi-regulator filings; recent filing errors or penalties; large regulatory-reporting team.

opportunities.name: Whistleblower & Ethics Triage
opportunities.problem_statement: Whistleblower hotline complaints accumulate; triage is manual; pattern detection across complaints is weak.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported whistleblower-complaint triage: classification, severity scoring, pattern detection across complaints, case-management workflow.
opportunities.use_when: Active whistleblower channel; large complaint volume; regulatory expectation on case-handling discipline.

opportunities.name: Carbon & Emissions Accounting
opportunities.problem_statement: Scope 1/2/3 emissions data is fragmented across systems; data quality is uncertain; assurance is costly.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated emissions accounting: Scope 1/2/3 data ingestion from energy/travel/supply-chain systems, factor management, audit trail for assurance.
opportunities.use_when: Carbon-reporting obligation (BRSR, CSRD, TCFD); multi-site/multi-country operations; recent assurance complaints.

opportunities.name: Sustainability Reporting (BRSR / CSRD / TCFD)
opportunities.problem_statement: Sustainability reporting is annual project work; data is gathered manually each year; framework mappings are bespoke.
opportunities.short_description: AI-supported sustainability reporting: framework-mapping automation, narrative drafting from data signals, year-on-year consistency.
opportunities.use_when: BRSR/CSRD/TCFD scope; annual reporting cycle; manual data gathering; consistency complaints from auditors/users.

opportunities.name: Sustainability Assurance Support
opportunities.problem_statement: Assurance over sustainability data is a fire drill; evidence is scattered; assurance providers ask for more than is available.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven assurance support: continuous evidence collection, sample-selection for assurance, walkthrough documentation, control-test automation.
opportunities.use_when: Active sustainability assurance engagement; recurring assurance findings; data-evidence gaps.

opportunities.name: High-Volume Multi-System Reconciliations
opportunities.problem_statement: Reconciliations across payment processors, settlement banks, internal ledgers, and partner platforms run at millions of records/day with manual exception handling.
opportunities.short_description: AI-driven high-volume reconciliation engine: real-time multi-leg matching across payment processor, settlement bank, internal ledger, partner platform; auto-classification of breaks; case-managed exceptions.
opportunities.use_when: Payment processor, banking, fintech, or platform business; daily reconciliation volumes >100K records; large exception-handling team; recent settlement disputes.

opportunities.name: Lending Operations
opportunities.problem_statement: Lending lifecycle (origination → underwriting → servicing → collections → recovery) runs across LMS, LOS, CBS, and BI systems with manual handoffs and exception handling.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated lending operations layer: underwriting decision support, servicing exception handling, repayment-behaviour monitoring, early-warning signals, collections optimisation.
opportunities.use_when: Active lending portfolio (banks, NBFCs, fintech lenders, captives); manual underwriting/servicing handoffs; rising NPA pressure; cost-to-serve gap vs digital-native peers.

opportunities.name: Insurance Operations
opportunities.problem_statement: Insurance ops (policy admin → claims → renewals) involves heavy document processing, fraud detection, customer-correspondence workflow, and reserves estimation.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated insurance ops layer: claims triage and fraud detection, policy admin straight-through processing, document understanding, reserves estimation support.
opportunities.use_when: Active insurance carrier or broker operations (life, health, general); manual claims processing; fraud-loss pressure; policy-admin backlog complaints.

opportunities.name: Customer-Facing Financial Operations
opportunities.problem_statement: Customer-facing finance ops (customer onboarding, KYC, AML, transaction monitoring, dispute handling, communication) are a regulated, high-volume, customer-satisfaction-critical domain.
opportunities.short_description: AI-orchestrated customer-facing ops layer: AML transaction monitoring, dispute triage, KYC remediation, customer communication automation with regulator-compliant audit trail.
opportunities.use_when: Bank, fintech, NBFC, payments, or wealth platform with retail customer base; active AML obligation; manual dispute and KYC processes; regulatory pressure.
